===Pokémon Adventures=== Opal debuted in ''[[PASS03|Chomp!! Defeat Drednaw]]''. She, along with various other Gym Leaders, was first seen reacting to the news that [[Leon]] had endorsed two {{pkmn|Trainer}}s for the [[Galar League|Gym Challenge]]. In ''[[PASS13|Glittering!! The Tapestry in the Vault]]'', Opal arrived in [[Hammerlocke]], where she met [[Henry Sword]] and [[Casey Shield]], the Trainers Leon endorsed. After introducing herself, Opal briefly traveled with them to [[Stow-on-Side]] before returning to [[Ballonlea]]. In ''[[PASS15|Shocking!! Reunion in the Forest]]'', Henry arrived at [[Ballonlea Stadium]] to challenge the Gym, but was stopped by Opal, who refused to let him on the field until he answered her quiz. After giving his answer, Henry was told to wait for his turn while Opal battled [[Hop]]. Once the battle was over, Opal took on Henry, during which she made an announcement that she planned on retiring as Gym Leader after the Gym Challenge had ended. Henry eventually won the battle, he failed to meet Opal's expectations as a successor for her Gym. In ''[[PASS18|Chomp!! It's Dracovish]]'', she defeated Casey in a Gym battle, eliminating the latter from the Gym Challenge. In ''[[PASS20|Cracking!! Brilliant Tap-Dancing]]'', Opal met with [[Bede]] at Ballonlea Stadium. Despite rejecting an earlier invitation, Bede decided to take Opal's offer to take over the title of Gym Leader. Opal quickly took a liking to Bede and accepted him as her successor. While Bede went through training, Opal questioned why [[Rose]] disqualified the boy from the Gym Challenge and decided to speak with the other Gym Leaders about the matter. In ''[[PASS25|Rumble!! The Horrific Darkest Day]]'', the Galar Gym Leaders agreed to gather at [[Rose Tower]] to find out whether or not Rose intended on bringing harm to the region. Opal and Bede arrived first, but were stopped by [[Oleana]]. While Oleana kept the Gym Leaders busy, Bede, Henry, Casey, Hop, and [[Marnie]] headed up the elevator to meet with Rose, only to learn he wasn't in the building. Appearing on a video screen, Rose revealed that he would be restarting the [[Darkest Day]] in order to ensure Galar has a future. Power Spot lights then began appearing all over Galar, causing Pokémon to begin [[Dynamax]]ing at random. Opal traveled to the Hammerlocke [[Energy Plant]] with the others, but decided to head back to Ballonlea to help deal with the rampaging Dynamax Pokémon. In ''[[PASS29|GRRR!! The Irrepairable Gears]]'', [[Macro Cosmos]] employees were dispatched to deal with the Dynamax Pokémon, allowing Opal's group to provide backup for the others against {{p|Eternatus}}. By the time they arrived, Opal's group found Eternatus had fled, leaving those who battled it unconscious and covered in poison. The injured were taken to a hospital to recover. {{-}} ====Pokémon==== {{anchor|Alcremie 2}}{{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Alcremie |giga=yes |type1=Fairy |gender=female |img=Opal Alcremie Adventures.png |img_size=120px |img2=Opal Gigantamax Alcremie Adventures.png |img2_size=150px |cap=Opal's Alcremie |cap2=Opal's Gigantamax Alcremie |epnum=PASS16 |epname=Rising!! Opal of Ballonlea |desc={{p|Alcremie}} is Opal's first known Pokémon. She was first used in Opal's Gym battle against [[Henry Sword|Henry]], where she bombarded his {{p|Sirfetch'd}}, [[Lancelot]], with a barrage of high-calorie cream missiles. After surviving Alcremie's attacks, Lancelot defeated her with a {{m|Max Steelspike}} boosted by an [[Expert Belt]]. Alcremie's only known move is {{m|Draining Kiss}}{{tt|*|Mentioned only}}.
As a Gigantamax Alcremie, she can use {{m|G-Max Finale}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Weezing |type1=Poison |type2=Fairy |img=Opal Weezing Adventures.png |epnum=PASS16 |epname=Rising!! Opal of Ballonlea |desc={{rf|Galarian}} {{p|Weezing}} is Opal's second known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Henry Sword|Henry]]'s {{p|Sirfetch'd}}, [[Lancelot]], in a Gym battle, but was defeated. Weezing's only known move is {{m|Sludge Bomb}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Opal |pkmn=Togekiss |type1=Fairy |type2=Flying |img=Opal Togekiss Adventures.png |img_size=130px |epnum=PASS16 |epname=Rising!! Opal of Ballonlea |desc={{p|Togekiss}} is Opal's third known Pokémon. It was first used to battle [[Henry Sword|Henry]]'s {{p|Gurdurr}}, Steeler, in a Gym battle, but was quickly defeated. Togekiss's only known move is {{m|Double-Edge}}.}}
